ignore.reason: Internal DI token exposing the library's resolved BymaxCacheModuleOptions provider. This app configures the module via BymaxCacheModuleOptions in cache.config.ts (demonstrated) rather than re-injecting the resolved handle; the token has no consumer-facing call site here.

Internal DI token exposing the library's resolved ICacheEvents provider. This app supplies lifecycle observation through BymaxCacheModuleOptions.events (the CacheEventsBridge, demonstrated) rather than re-injecting the resolved handle.
